completed_tasks.name: S17-19: Li criterion — g_k formula, N_0=11, oscillation period, circularity
S19-21: Connes formulas confirmed correct (W02, WR, Wp — Grok verified twice)
S21: Sign convention resolved — eigenvector near eval 0 is correct xi
S21: N=30 proof of concept — xi_hat zero at 14.131 (0.003 from gamma_1)
S21: N=120 runs — near-zero eigenvector degrades, quadrature suspected
S21: Prolate overlap initial (0.345 at lambda=sqrt(14))

remaining_tasks.name: Eliminate ALL quadrature from gamma_L: resolve c(L) integral identity exactly
Brute-force eigenvector scan at N=120: which eigvec gives xi_hat(g1)~0?
Improve prolate overlap with actual PSWF (not Hermite limit)
Polish Li preprint for arxiv submission

blockers.blocker: gamma_L correction integral uses numerical quadrature — last non-exact piece. May corrupt eigenvector at N=120.
Sign convention: eigenvector selection = nearest eval to 0, not most negative. Works at N=30 but not N=120.

decisions.decision: QW sign: our convention is OPPOSITE to paper's. Eigenvector for eval nearest 0 = paper's smallest eval eigenvector.
decisions.rationale: Grok confirmed. At N=30: eval +0.38 eigenvector gives xi_hat zero at 14.131 (0.003 from gamma_1). Most negative eval eigenvector gives garbage.

decisions.decision: N=120 degradation from N=30 likely due to remaining quadrature in gamma_L correction
decisions.rationale: N=30 gives xi_hat(g1)=1.3e-4 (excellent), N=120 gives 0.11 (100x worse). Only difference: more modes amplify quadrature error. Fix: eliminate quadrature entirely.

decisions.decision: Rayleigh quotient test is the most promising path to close the prolate gap
decisions.rationale: Grok identifies: feed k_lambda into tau, compute quotient, compare with epsilon_N. Difference should be O(1/log^2 lambda). Standard variational argument from quantum mechanics.

decisions.decision: Li criterion g_k formula confirmed novel by Grok literature search
decisions.rationale: Maslanka 2004 has conceptual split, but exact g_k = (-1)^k[(1-2^{-k})zeta(k)-1]/k not in Coffey, Voros, Lagarias, or any other reference. N_0=11 and oscillation period also new.

next_action: SESSION 22: (1) Resolve gamma_L c(L) identity to eliminate ALL quadrature from a_n, (2) Rerun N=120 with fully exact a_n, (3) If zeros match: implement Rayleigh quotient test for multiple lambda values. The gamma_L fix is the key — it's the last numerical quadrature piece and likely causes the N=120 degradation.
context_notes: 21 scripts. Li (10): li_criterion.py through li_zeta_bound.py. Connes (11): connes_weil.py through connes_N120_exact.py + connes_prolate_overlap.py. Preprint: docs/li_decomposition_preprint.tex. Key numbers: N=30 xi_hat zero at 14.131 (0.003 from g1), gamma_L offset = 1.33691 (constant), sign convention = negate for paper's convention. Grok's Rayleigh quotient suggestion is the path to closing the prolate gap. Python: /c/Python313/python.exe, mp.dps=200.
